subcodes.first_line: The mention proceeding from Us is for him who hastened with his heart unto the Qiblih of the world and bore witness to that whereunto God Himself had testified ere the creation of the heavens [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن سرع بقلبه الی قبله العالم و شهد بما شهد الله قبل خلق السموات و
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @consolation and comfort
